_doc: Little Buddy Card — Sprite-Generation Preset (Task t_99cd9b1a). Geladen via scripts/load_littlebuddy_preset.py gegen SwarmUI @ 192.168.178.53:7801. ACHTUNG: Repo-Workflows (build_*.py, katharina_*.json) nutzen falsch 'katharina character, cute chibi kawaii girl...' — die LoRA littlebuddy_pixel.safetensors ist ein 32x32 CHIBI-CREATURE, Trigger 'littlebuddy'. Diese Templates sind CORRECT.

prompt_templates.positive_base: littlebuddy, pixel art chibi creature, {pose}, white background, masterpiece, highly detailed
prompt_templates.negative: muted, blurry, deformed, noise, borders, frame, text, signature, watermark, realistic, photo, 3d, multiple characters, missing eye, extra eye, extra limb

pose_templates.idle: neutral standing pose, idle, both feet planted, calm expression
pose_templates.idle_blink: neutral standing pose, eyes closed briefly, gentle idle
pose_templates.happy: happy expression, cheerful pose, small bounce
pose_templates.sad: sad expression, drooping posture, lowered head
pose_templates.surprised: surprised expression, eyes wide, slight recoil
pose_templates.walk_a: mid-step, one foot forward, weight shifted
pose_templates.walk_b: mid-step, other foot forward, weight shifted
pose_templates.three_quarter: three-quarter view, slight turn, casual stance

notes: Task verlangt 'low resolution e.g. 64x64, no smoothing'. SDXL bei echten 64x64 ist qualitativ schwach (Mush). Empfehlung: bei generate_resolution=512 generieren, dann Nearest-Neighbor auf 64x64 runterscalen (kein Smoothing) — das ist der korrekte Pixel-Art-Workflow.
Alternative fuer echte 64x64 NES-Look: RetroDiffusion (256 nativ) oder concept/8bitdiffuser_64x LoRA statt SDXL. Nur wenn SDXL-Output nicht 'pixelig' genug.

LoRA littlebuddy_pixel.safetensors liegt lokal unter /root/little-buddy-card/assets/training/. Sie MUSS physisch in SwarmUI's LoRA-Ordner (ComfyUI models/loras/) liegen, damit SwarmUI-API sie laedt. ComfyUI-direct akzeptiert object_info-Namen.
LoRA-Index-Mismatch bekannt: SwarmUI WebAPI validiert gegen eigenen Index. Falls 'option does not exist' -> ComfyUI-Direct (build_*.py) nutzen, nicht /API/GenerateText2Image.
